显示 HN：我制作了开源、零功耗 PCB 黑客马拉松徽章

Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges

github.com 作者 kaipereira 分数 74 评论 8 2026/04/04 22:20
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 这些是我为新加坡 Overglade 黑客马拉松设计的零功耗黑客马拉松徽章！它们由 RP2040 供电，并具有无源 NFC 和板载电子墨水驱动器！
  2. 定制功能
  3. 无源 NFC 轻按您的心愿 电子墨水支持，这样您就不需要任何电池 20 个 GPIO 连接到插头引脚上，用于编程 主动 NFC 模式（如果您想做一些更复杂的事情） 零功耗，该板不需要电源，因为它的核心功能 带有 4MB 闪存的 RP2040 SoC 酷 PCB 和裸露铜艺术
  4. PCB 设计 PCB 是一个简单的 2 层板，每层都有接地填充。我还对电路板的形状和艺术进行了 CAD 编辑，以确保一切都完美对称！
  5. 编程和设置 该板的设置非常简单！只需通过 USB-C 将其插入计算机，放入 Pi Pico micropython 引导加载程序，然后使用 Thonny 将固件上传到开发板！您可以修改 config.json 以添加您自己的个人详细信息，并通过替换位图来更改图像（我喜欢为此使用 Magick）！订购 PCB 如果您想拥有自己的电路板，那么制造这些电路板非常容易！批量订购要便宜得多，大约每板不到 5 美元，电子墨水另加 5 美元，但使用 PCBA 订购 5 个起订量将花费约 100 美元（不过手工焊接可能要便宜得多）。我使用 JLC 对我的板进行 PCBA，您只需拖放 gerbers.zip，然后使用 Productions 文件夹中的 JLC BOM 和指示符/CPL。某些零件方向可能会出现偏差，因此请务必纠正这些方向！贡献 这些是新加坡 Overglade 黑客马拉松的徽章，这是一项针对高中生的 HackClub 活动！感谢整个 overglade 团队为举办这次活动所做的辛勤工作，并感谢 @nimitvijayvargee 和 @mpkendall 在固件方面提供的帮助 - @joysudo、@froppii 和 @mynameisashllee 在艺术方面提供的帮助！继续破解o7

Original Summary

  1. These are zero-power hackathon badges I designed for the overglade hackathon in singapore! They're powered by the RP2040 and have passive NFC and an onboard e-ink driver!
  2. Custom Features
  3. Passive NFC tap for whatever your heart desires E-ink support so that you don't need any battery 20 GPIO's broken out onto header pins for programming Active NFC mode if you want to do some more complicated stuff Zero power, the board needs no power for it's core features RP2040 SoC with 4MB flash memory Cool PCB and exposed copper art
  4. PCB Design The PCB is a simple, 2 layer board with ground fills on each layer. I also CAD'ed the shapes and art of the board to make sure everything was perfectly symmetrical!
  5. Programming and Setup The board is really easy to setup! Just plug it into your computer via USB-C, drop in the Pi Pico micropython bootloader and then upload the firmware using Thonny to the devboard! You can modify the config.json to add your own personal details, and change the images by replacing the bitmaps (I like to use Magick for this)! Ordering the PCB's The boards are really easy to get manufactured if you'd like to have some of your own! They're much cheaper to order in bulk, at about less than $5/board and another $5 for the e-ink, but getting at MOQ will cost about $100 for 5 with PCBA (hand soldering is probably significantly cheaper though). I used JLC to PCBA my boards, you can just drag and drop the gerbers.zip, and then use the JLC BOM and designators/CPL all in the productions folder. Some of the part orientations might be off, so make sure you correct those! Contributions These were badges for the overglade hackathon in singapore, a HackClub event for highschoolers! Thanks to the whole overglade team for their hard work in putting the event together, and thanks to @nimitvijayvargee and @mpkendall for helping with firmware - @joysudo, @froppii and @mynameisashllee for helping with the art! Keep on hacking o7

评论（默认中文）

sen 2026/04/05 09:03
太酷了。

我有一些不使用任何电源的电子纸相框，当您用手机轻触它们时，它会使用 NFC 供电来启动自身并更新您发送给它的照片。这是一个很酷的想法，我一直觉得它可以更多地用于不需要经常更新的显示器。

That's very cool.

I have a few ePaper picture frames that don't use any power, and when you tap your phone to them it uses the power-over-NFC to boot itself and update the photo you send to it. It's such a cool idea and something I always felt like could be used more for displays that don't need to update very often.

在 HN 中查看
bschwindHN 2026/04/05 10:24
非常酷！简单的问题：您是否使用插件来生成 NFC 天线？

路线和布局看起来不错。最终的结果很棒！我敢打赌，第一次尝试就成功了，这是令人满意的。

Very cool! Quick question: did you use a plugin to generate the NFC antenna?

The routing and layout looks nice. The end result is great! I bet it was satisfying to get it working on the first try.

在 HN 中查看
kaipereira 2026/04/05 10:50
我用过 https://eds.st.com/antenna/#/ 获得适合 4.7uH 目标电感的天线，然后使用 https://github.com/nideri/nfc_antenna_generator 创建我为电路板稍微修改的足迹！您可以在期刊 (JOURNAL.md) 中阅读更多相关内容！

让一切正常工作真的很令人满意（特别是 NFC，因为我发现 RF 有点棘手），但 eink 逻辑实际上有点赌博，因为我在原型设计时打破了我唯一的 eink，所以生产批次是驱动程序的第一次测试。因此，在设计原型时请务必携带备用部件！

I used https://eds.st.com/antenna/#/ to get an antenna that fit with a target inductance of 4.7uH and then used https://github.com/nideri/nfc_antenna_generator to create the footprint which I slightly modified for the board! You can read a bit more about it in the journal (JOURNAL.md)!

It was really satisfying to get everything working (especially the NFC because I've found RF to be a bit tricky), but the eink logic was actually a bit of gamble, because I broke my only eink while prototyping so the production batch was the first test of the driver. So always carry spare components when designing prototypes!

在 HN 中查看
robertclaus 2026/04/05 06:55
他们最终花了多少钱？我们每年都会为另一场活动制作类似的 PCB 奖章，但由于成本原因未能做到如此精美。我们通常只能在较低的预算范围内购买一些 LED 和处理器。
How much did they end up costing? We do a similar PCB medallion every year for another event and haven't been able to get quite that fancy due to cost. We usually only manage to get some LEDs and a processor in our lower budget range.
在 HN 中查看
kaipereira 2026/04/05 07:16
60 个徽章的总价约为 10 美元/徽章（徽章 5 个，电子墨水 5 个），我们犯了订购不够的错误，所以我们又订购了几个，每个徽章贵了约 1 美元。我们从 JLC 购买了所有徽章，如果您想了解它们在更高订单数量下的价格，产品文件位于存储库中！
The total ended up being about $10/badge for 60 (5 for badge, 5 for eink), and we made the mistake of not ordering enough, so we ordered a couple more that were about $1 more expensive each. We bought all the badges from JLC and the prod files are in the repo if you want to see how much they come to in higher order quantity!
在 HN 中查看
NooneAtAll3 2026/04/05 08:46
“零功耗”究竟是如何运作的？所有电源都来自 NFC？
how does "zero-power" work exactly? all power from NFC?
在 HN 中查看
kaipereira 2026/04/05 08:49
因此，一旦编程，eink 就会保持其状态，因此您确实需要通过 USB-C 对徽章进行初始编程，然后 NFC 使用无源 RF 采集。
So the eink holds its state once it’s programmed so you do need an initial program of the badge through USB-C, and then the NFC uses passive RF harvesting.
在 HN 中查看
cactacea 2026/04/05 08:50
是的 NFC 和电子墨水显示屏 无需电池
yes NFC and with an e-ink display no battery needed from there
在 HN 中查看
